project: A set of forensic analytic tools for image and video processing for the criminal police and investigation service
title: Sada forenznich analytickych nastroju ke zpracovani obrazu a videa pro sluzbu kriminalni policie a vysetrovani

metadata.agency: Ministry of the Interior of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: Strategicka podpora rozvoje bezpecnostniho vyzkumu CR 2019–2025 (IMPAKT 1) PODPROGRAMU 1 SPOLECNE VYZKUMNE PROJEKTY (BV IMP1/2VS)

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: A set of forensic analytic tools for image and video processing for the criminal police and investigation service

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: analysis of known and unknown data repositories, image and video data extraction, image processing and analysis, video sequence data

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The content of the project directly requires the activities of the security forces of the Czech Republic in the field of (1) analysis of known and unknown data repositories or streams for extraction, especially image and video data, (2) processing and analysis of image and video data to effectively present which objects exist , finding activities, description of parameters, monitoring of movement and changes and other similar tasks, at the same time also in the field and further (3) finding out knowledge and connections from image and video sequence data and from metadata connected with such data.
